summary: Phase 2 Merchant Dashboard Advanced Stats testing complete. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing passed - period selector, stats cards with growth indicators, mini accounting section, and recharts sales evolution chart all working correctly.

issues: Minor console warning about recharts container dimensions during initial load (does not affect functionality)
Stats cards show -100% when 'Aujourd'hui' has 0 transactions vs previous day (expected behavior)

seed_data_creation: Used existing 20 transactions from Phase 1 setup
